title: Feature Flag Enabled: Lab Results Integration — New Structured View (2% Internal Rollout)
raw_text:
## Feature Flag Event

Flag name: lab_results_structured_view_v2
Status: ENABLED
Environment: production
Current rollout: 2% (internal users only)
Variant: treatment (new structured view)

## Capability Description

The new lab results structured view replaces the legacy flat-text rendering with a structured, sortable table format. Each result set is organized by panel, with reference range highlighting and trend indicators for sequential values. Users on the field medical tools surface who access lab results data will see the new interface.

This is a genuinely new capability. The previous rendering was a read-only text dump from the upstream lab integration; the new view adds interactivity and contextual display logic.

## Rollout Status

As of this flag event, 2% of internal users (staff accounts) have been assigned to the treatment variant. No external or partner-facing users are in scope at this stage.

Full ramp schedule: TBD pending metrics review. The product team is monitoring session engagement, error rate, and user feedback before committing to a broader ramp. A ramp decision meeting is tentatively scheduled for a future sprint.

## Affected Surfaces

The change is visible on the field medical tools portal, specifically in the patient case detail view where lab result panels are displayed. No changes to the data API; only the rendering layer is affected.

## Rollback

Flag can be toggled off at any time with immediate effect. No data migration involved.

rollout_hints.ramp: 2% internal only; full ramp schedule TBD pending metrics review
rollout_hints.target_population: Internal staff accounts on field medical tools portal
